import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
import json 

def create_dot_plot(title, params, size, position):
    plot = DotPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Rename 'final_analysis' to 'cell state'
    cells_df.rename(columns={"final_analysis": "cell state"}, inplace=True)
    
    # Add UMAP data to the dataframe
    umap_np = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])
    cells_df["UMAP 1"] = umap_np[:, 0]
    cells_df["UMAP 2"] = umap_np[:, 1]
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # DotPlot parameters for TNF
    gene_name = "TNF"
    dot_title = f"Gene expression for {gene_name} per cell state"
    dot_params = ["cell state", f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)}"]
    dot_size = [450, 300]
    dot_position = [10, 10]
    
    # Create dot plot
    dot_plot = create_dot_plot(dot_title, dot_params, dot_size, dot_position)
    
    # Convert plots to JSON and set view
    dot_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(dot_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [dot_plot_json]}}
    
    # Creating the link between the two datasets so that selecting a subset of genes to add the expression in cells is enabled
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray()) # add the gene expression
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.heatmap_plot import HeatmapPlot
from mdvtools.charts.histogram_plot import HistogramPlot
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot_3D import ScatterPlot3D
from mdvtools.charts.row_chart import RowChart
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
from mdvtools.charts.abundance_box_plot import AbundanceBoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart
from mdvtools.charts.ring_chart import RingChart
from mdvtools.charts.violin_plot import ViolinPlot
from mdvtools.charts.multi_line_plot import MultiLinePlot
from mdvtools.charts.table_plot import TablePlot
from mdvtools.charts.wordcloud_plot import WordcloudPlot
import json
import numpy as np
import sys

def load_data(path):
    #Load data from the specified CSV file.
    return pd.read_csv(path, low_memory=False)

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    #Convert plot data to JSON format.
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))
    

def create_stacked_row_plot(title, params, size, position, legend_display, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties):
    plot = StackedRowChart(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_legend(legend_display)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", xaxis_properties)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", yaxis_properties)
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "Can you please generate a bar plot of the abundance of the cells clusters?"
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=False)
    
    # StackedRowChart parameters
    stacked_title = "Abundance of Cell Clusters"
    stacked_params = ['cell state',  'Cluster']
    stacked_size = [792, 472]
    stacked_position = [10, 10]
    stacked_legend_display = True
    stacked_xaxis_properties = {"label": "Cell State", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    stacked_yaxis_properties = {"label": "Cluster", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    
    # Create stacked row plot
    stacked_row_plot = create_stacked_row_plot(
        stacked_title, stacked_params, stacked_size, stacked_position, stacked_legend_display, stacked_xaxis_properties, stacked_yaxis_properties
    )
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    stacked_row_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(stacked_row_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [stacked_row_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    # project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
else:
    main()

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import os
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart

# Load the data
adata = sc.read_h5ad('../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad')
cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
cells_df["UMAP 1"] = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])[:, 0]
cells_df["UMAP 2"] = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])[:, 1]
cells_df["Cell ID"] = adata.obs.index
cells_df.rename(columns={"sub_bucket": "Cell type", "final_analysis": "Cell state", "MM_scaled": "Inflammation score", 
                         "sample_id": "Sample ID"}, inplace=True)

# Genes dataframe
gene_table = adata.var
gene_table["gene_id"] = gene_table.index

# Create a dot plot for CD13
gene_name = "CD13"

dot_plot_cd13 = DotPlot(
    title=f"Percent of gene expression for {gene_name} per cell state",
    params=["Cell state", f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{gene_table.index.get_loc(gene_name)}"],
    size=[450, 300],
    position=[10, 470]
)

# Configure the dot plot
dot_plot_cd13.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
dot_plot_cd13.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
dot_plot_cd13.set_axis_properties("ry", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
dot_plot_cd13.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
dot_plot_cd13.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
dot_plot_cd13.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])

# Set up and serve the MDV project
base = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv')
project_path = os.path.join(base, 'taurus_new_cd13')  # Define the location where the project metadata will be stored
p = MDVProject(os.path.expanduser(project_path), delete_existing=True)

# Add the data sources to the project
p.add_datasource("Cells", cells_df)
p.add_datasource("Genes", gene_table)

# Create the link between the two datasets
p.add_rows_as_columns_link("Cells", "Genes", "gene_id", "Gene expression")
p.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("Cells", "Genes", "Gene expression", adata.layers["counts"].toarray())  # Add the gene expression

# Convert the chart implementation outputs to JSON and set up the project view
list_charts = [dot_plot_cd13.plot_data]

# Set the config combining the two panels
view_config = {'initialCharts': {"Cells": list_charts, "Genes": []}}

# Add the view to the project configuration
p.set_view("Cells", view_config)

p.set_editable(True)
p.convert_to_static_page("~/mdv/taurus_new_cd13_static/")
# Serve the project
p.serve()

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import os
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart

# Load the data
adata = sc.read_h5ad('../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad')
cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
cells_df["UMAP 1"] = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])[:, 0]
cells_df["UMAP 2"] = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])[:, 1]
cells_df["Cell ID"] = adata.obs.index
cells_df.rename(columns={"sub_bucket": "Cell type", "final_analysis": "Cell state", "MM_scaled": "Inflammation score", 
                         "sample_id": "Sample ID"}, inplace=True)

# Genes dataframe
gene_table = adata.var
gene_table["gene_id"] = gene_table.index

# Set up the MDV project
base = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv')
project_path = os.path.join(base, 'gene_expression_project')
p = MDVProject(os.path.expanduser(project_path), delete_existing=True)

# Add data sources
p.add_datasource("Cells", cells_df)
p.add_datasource("Genes", gene_table)

# Create the link between the two datasets
p.add_rows_as_columns_link("Cells", "Genes", "gene_id", "Gene expression")
p.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("Cells", "Genes", "Gene expression", adata.layers["counts"].toarray())

# Define the gene name
gene_name = "CD14"

# Create a dot plot for the gene expression
dot_plot = DotPlot(
    title=f"Percent of gene expression for {gene_name} per cell state",
    params=["Cell state", f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{gene_table.index.get_loc(gene_name)}"],
    size=[450, 300],
    position=[10, 470]
)

# Configure the dot plot
dot_plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
dot_plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
dot_plot.set_axis_properties("ry", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
dot_plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
dot_plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
dot_plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])

# Convert the chart implementation outputs to JSON and set up the project view
list_charts = [dot_plot.plot_data]
view_config = {'initialCharts': {"Cells": list_charts, "Genes": []}}

# Add the view to the project configuration
p.set_view("Gene Expression", view_config)

# Set the project to be editable and serve it
p.set_editable(True)
p.convert_to_static_page("~/mdv/gene_expression_static/")
p.serve()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
import json 

def create_dot_plot(title, params, size, position):
    plot = DotPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Rename 'final_analysis' to 'cell state'
    cells_df.rename(columns={"final_analysis": "cell state"}, inplace=True)
    
    # Add UMAP data to the dataframe
    umap_np = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])
    cells_df["UMAP 1"] = umap_np[:, 0]
    cells_df["UMAP 2"] = umap_np[:, 1]
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # DotPlot parameters for CD14
    gene_name = "CD14"
    dot_title = f"Gene expression for {gene_name} per cell state"
    dot_params = ["cell state", f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)}"]
    dot_size = [450, 300]
    dot_position = [10, 10]
    
    # Create dot plot
    dot_plot = create_dot_plot(dot_title, dot_params, dot_size, dot_position)
    
    # Convert plots to JSON and set view
    dot_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(dot_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [dot_plot_json]}}
    
    # Creating the link between the two datasets so that selecting a subset of genes to add the expression in cells is enabled
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray()) # add the gene expression
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import sys
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
import json 

def create_box_plot(title, params, size, position, plot_id):
    """Create and configure a BoxPlot instance with the given parameters."""
    plot = BoxPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position,
        id=plot_id
    )
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    """Main function to create the project and serve it."""
    # Constants
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # BoxPlot parameters for the specific gene "CD14"
    gene_name = "CD14"

    # The format f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)}" is used to get the gene expression data for that specific gene
    box_title = f"Gene expression for {gene_name} per Disease"
    box_params = ["Disease", f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)}"]
    box_size = [615, 557]
    box_position = [50, 50]
    box_plot_id = "boxPlot1"
    
    # Create box plot
    box_plot = create_box_plot(
        box_title, box_params, box_size, box_position, box_plot_id
    )
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    box_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(box_plot)
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [box_plot_json]}}
    
    # Create the link between the two datasets
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene Expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray())  # Add the gene expression
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.heatmap_plot import HeatmapPlot
from mdvtools.charts.histogram_plot import HistogramPlot
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot_3D import ScatterPlot3D
from mdvtools.charts.row_chart import RowChart
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
from mdvtools.charts.abundance_box_plot import AbundanceBoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart
from mdvtools.charts.ring_chart import RingChart
from mdvtools.charts.violin_plot import ViolinPlot
from mdvtools.charts.multi_line_plot import MultiLinePlot
from mdvtools.charts.table_plot import TablePlot
from mdvtools.charts.wordcloud_plot import WordcloudPlot
import json
import numpy as np
import sys

def load_data(path):
    #Load data from the specified CSV file.
    return pd.read_csv(path, low_memory=False)

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    #Convert plot data to JSON format.
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))
    


def create_scatter_plot(title, params, size, position, default_color, brush, on_filter, radius, opacity):
    plot = ScatterPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position,
        default_color=default_color,
        brush=brush,
        on_filter=on_filter,
        radius=radius,
        opacity=opacity
    )
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "Can you please generate a scatter plot of UMAP?"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "file_path"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Rename 'final_analysis' to 'cell state'
    cells_df.rename(columns={"final_analysis": "cell state"}, inplace=True)
    
    # Add UMAP data to the dataframe
    umap_np = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])
    cells_df["UMAP 1"] = umap_np[:, 0]
    cells_df["UMAP 2"] = umap_np[:, 1]
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=False)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # ScatterPlot parameters
    scatter_title = "UMAP Scatter Plot"
    scatter_params = ["UMAP 1", "UMAP 2"]
    scatter_size = [450, 450]
    scatter_position = [10, 10]
    scatter_default_color = "#377eb8"
    scatter_brush = "default"
    scatter_on_filter = "hide"
    scatter_radius = 5
    scatter_opacity = 0.8
    
    # Create scatter plot
    scatter_plot = create_scatter_plot(scatter_title, scatter_params, scatter_size, scatter_position, scatter_default_color, scatter_brush, scatter_on_filter, scatter_radius, scatter_opacity)
    
    # Convert plots to JSON and set view
    scatter_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(scatter_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [scatter_plot_json]}}
    
    # Creating the link between the two datasets so that selecting a subset of genes to add the expression in cells is enabled
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray()) # add the gene expression
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    # project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
else:
    main()

    plot = DotPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):

    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray()) # add the gene expression

from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject

from mdvtools.charts.histogram_plot import HistogramPlot
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot_3D import ScatterPlot3D
from mdvtools.charts.row_chart import RowChart
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot

from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart

from mdvtools.charts.multi_line_plot import MultiLinePlot

import json
import numpy as np
import sys

def load_data(path):
    #Load data from the specified CSV file.
    return pd.read_csv(path, low_memory=False)

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    #Convert plot data to JSON format.
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))
    


def create_scatter_plot(title, params, size, position, color, x_axis_settings, y_axis_settings):
    """Create and configure a ScatterPlot instance with the given parameters."""
    plot = ScatterPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )

    plot.set_color_by(color)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", x_axis_settings)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", y_axis_settings)

    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

    umap_np = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])

    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=False)

    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    
    # ScatterPlot parameters
    scatter_title = "UMAP Scatter Plot"
    scatter_params = ["UMAP 1", "UMAP 2"]
    scatter_size = [792, 472]
    scatter_position = [10, 10]
    scatter_color = 'final_analysis'  # Assuming 'final_analysis' is the column for cell state/type
    
    scatter_x_axis_settings = {'size': 30, 'label': "UMAP 1", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10}
    scatter_y_axis_settings = {'size': 45, 'label': "UMAP 2", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10, 'rotate_labels': False}
    
    # Create scatter plot
    scatter_plot = create_scatter_plot(
        scatter_title, scatter_params, scatter_size, scatter_position, scatter_color, scatter_x_axis_settings, scatter_y_axis_settings
    )
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    scatter_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(scatter_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [scatter_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    # project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":

else:

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject

from mdvtools.charts.histogram_plot import HistogramPlot

from mdvtools.charts.multi_line_plot import MultiLinePlot
from mdvtools.charts.table_plot import TablePlot
from mdvtools.charts.wordcloud_plot import WordcloudPlot
import json
import numpy as np
import sys

def load_data(path):
    #Load data from the specified CSV file.
    return pd.read_csv(path, low_memory=False)

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    #Convert plot data to JSON format.
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))
    


def create_box_plot(title, params, size, position, plot_id):
    """Create and configure a BoxPlot instance with the given parameters."""
    plot = BoxPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position,
        id=plot_id
    )
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

    """Main function to create the project and serve it."""
    # Constants

    view_name = "Find the gene with the highest expression and plot its expression"

    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Find the gene with the highest expression
    gene_expression_matrix = adata.X.toarray()

    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", gene_expression_matrix)
    
    # BoxPlot parameters for the gene with the highest expression
    box_title = f"Gene expression for {highest_expression_gene_name} per disease"
    box_params = ['Disease',  'Gene expression|{highest_expression_gene_name}(Gene expression)|{highest_expression_gene_index}']

    )

    box_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(box_plot)
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [box_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    # project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
else:
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.heatmap_plot import HeatmapPlot
from mdvtools.charts.histogram_plot import HistogramPlot
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot_3D import ScatterPlot3D
from mdvtools.charts.row_chart import RowChart
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
from mdvtools.charts.abundance_box_plot import AbundanceBoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart
from mdvtools.charts.ring_chart import RingChart
from mdvtools.charts.violin_plot import ViolinPlot
from mdvtools.charts.multi_line_plot import MultiLinePlot
from mdvtools.charts.table_plot import TablePlot
from mdvtools.charts.wordcloud_plot import WordcloudPlot
import json
import numpy as np
import sys

def load_data(path):
    #Load data from the specified CSV file.
    return pd.read_csv(path, low_memory=False)

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    #Convert plot data to JSON format.
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))
    


def create_scatter_plot(title, params, size, position, color, x_axis_settings, y_axis_settings):
    """Create and configure a ScatterPlot instance with the given parameters."""
    plot = ScatterPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_by(color)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", x_axis_settings)  # x-axis settings
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", y_axis_settings)  # y-axis settings
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    """Main function to create the project and serve it."""
    # Constants
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "Can you please generate a scatter plot?"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "/Users/mariak/Documents/MDV/python/mdvtools/llm/sample_data/bcell_viz_ready_revised.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)

    # Name datasource
    datasource_name = 'cells'
    cells_df.name = datasource_name
    
    # Add UMAP data to the dataframe
    umap_np = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])
    cells_df["UMAP 1"] = umap_np[:, 0]
    cells_df["UMAP 2"] = umap_np[:, 1]
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=False)
    
    # Add datasource
    # project.add_datasource(datasource_name, cells_df)
    
    # ScatterPlot parameters
    scatter_title = "UMAP Scatter Plot"
    scatter_params = ["UMAP 1", "UMAP 2"]
    scatter_size = [792, 472]
    scatter_position = [10, 10]
    scatter_color = 'cell state'
    scatter_x_axis_settings = {'size': 30, 'label': "UMAP 1", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10}
    scatter_y_axis_settings = {'size': 45, 'label': "UMAP 2", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10, 'rotate_labels': False}
    
    # Create scatter plot
    scatter_plot = create_scatter_plot(
        scatter_title, scatter_params, scatter_size, scatter_position, scatter_color, scatter_x_axis_settings, scatter_y_axis_settings
    )
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    scatter_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(scatter_plot)
    scatter_view = {'initialCharts': {datasource_name: [scatter_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, scatter_view)
    project.set_editable(True)
    # project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
else:
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import sys
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
import json 

def create_box_plot(title, params, size, position):
    """Create and configure a BoxPlot instance with the given parameters."""
    plot = BoxPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\\\", ""))

def main():
    """Main function to create the project and serve it."""
    # Constants
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data using scanpy
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df.name = 'genes'
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index

    # Rename 'final_analysis' to 'cell state'
    cells_df.rename(columns={"final_analysis": "cell state"}, inplace=True)
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # Create a link between the two datasets
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene Expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray())
    
    # BoxPlot parameters for the specific gene "CD14"
    gene_name = "CD14"

    # The format f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)}" is used to get the gene expression data for that specific gene
    box_title = f"Gene expression for {gene_name} per Disease"
    box_params = ["Disease", f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)}"]
    box_size = [792, 472]
    box_position = [10, 10]
    
    # Create plot
    plot = create_box_plot(box_title, box_params, box_size, box_position)
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    boxplot_chart_json = convert_plot_to_json(plot)
    boxplot_view = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [boxplot_chart_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, boxplot_view)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import json
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot

def create_box_plot(title, params, size, position):
    """Create and configure a BoxPlot instance with the given parameters."""
    plot = BoxPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    """Main function to create the project and serve it."""
    # Constants
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "Gene Expression Box Plot by Cell Type"
    
    # Load data using scanpy
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df.name = 'genes'
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index

    # Rename 'final_analysis' to 'cell state'
    cells_df.rename(columns={"final_analysis": "cell state"}, inplace=True)
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # Create a link between the two datasets
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene Expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray())
    
    # BoxPlot parameters for a specific gene
    gene_name = "YOUR_GENE_NAME"  # Replace with the gene of interest
    box_title = f"Gene expression for {gene_name} per Cell Type"
    box_params = ["cell state", f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)}"]
    box_size = [792, 472]
    box_position = [10, 10]
    
    # Create plot
    plot = create_box_plot(box_title, box_params, box_size, box_position)
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    boxplot_chart_json = convert_plot_to_json(plot)
    boxplot_view = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [boxplot_chart_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, boxplot_view)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart
import json

def create_stacked_row_plot(title, params, size, position, legend_display, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties):
    plot = StackedRowChart(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_legend(legend_display)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", xaxis_properties)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", yaxis_properties)
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    # Constants
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')

    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)

    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart
import json

def create_stacked_row_plot(title, params, size, position, legend_display, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties):
    plot = StackedRowChart(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_legend(legend_display)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", xaxis_properties)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", yaxis_properties)
    return plot

def create_scatter_plot(title, params, size, position, color, x_axis_settings, y_axis_settings):
    plot = ScatterPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_by(color)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", x_axis_settings)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", y_axis_settings)
    return plot

def create_dot_plot(title, params, size, position):
    plot = DotPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])
    return plot

def create_box_plot(title, params, size, position, plot_id):
    plot = BoxPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position,
        id=plot_id
    )
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    # Rename 'final_analysis' to 'cell state'
    cells_df.rename(columns={"final_analysis": "cell state"}, inplace=True)
    
    # Add UMAP data to the dataframe
    umap_np = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])
    cells_df["UMAP 1"] = umap_np[:, 0]
    cells_df["UMAP 2"] = umap_np[:, 1]
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)

    # Update datasource with the new columns provided through the scanpy object
    project.set_column('cells', "UMAP 1", cells_df["UMAP 1"])
    project.set_column('cells', "UMAP 2", cells_df["UMAP 2"])
    
    # StackedRowChart parameters for cell phase distribution
    stacked_title = "Distribution of Cell Phases"
    stacked_params = ["phase", "cell state"]
    stacked_size = [792, 472]
    stacked_position = [10, 10]
    stacked_legend_display = True
    stacked_xaxis_properties = {"label": "Phase", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    stacked_yaxis_properties = {"label": "Cell State", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    
    # Create stacked row plot for cell phase distribution
    stacked_row_plot = create_stacked_row_plot(
        stacked_title, stacked_params, stacked_size, stacked_position, stacked_legend_display, stacked_xaxis_properties, stacked_yaxis_properties
    )
    
    # ScatterPlot parameters
    scatter_title = "UMAP Scatter Plot"
    scatter_params = ["UMAP 1", "UMAP 2"]
    scatter_size = [792, 472]
    scatter_position = [820, 10]
    scatter_color = 'cell state'
    scatter_x_axis_settings = {'size': 30, 'label': "UMAP 1", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10}
    scatter_y_axis_settings = {'size': 45, 'label': "UMAP 2", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10, 'rotate_labels': False}
    
    # Create scatter plot
    scatter_plot = create_scatter_plot(
        scatter_title, scatter_params, scatter_size, scatter_position, scatter_color, scatter_x_axis_settings, scatter_y_axis_settings
    )
    
    # DotPlot parameters
    dot_title = "Gene expression counts per cell state dot plot"
    dot_params = ["cell state", "n_genes_by_counts", "total_counts"]
    dot_size = [400, 250]
    dot_position = [10, 500]
    
    # Create dot plot
    dot_plot = create_dot_plot(dot_title, dot_params, dot_size, dot_position)
    
    # BoxPlot parameters
    box_title = "Gene expression counts per disease box plot"
    box_params = ["Disease", "n_genes_by_counts"]
    box_size = [615, 557]
    box_position = [500, 500]
    box_plot_id = "boxPlot1"
    
    # Create box plot
    box_plot = create_box_plot(
        box_title, box_params, box_size, box_position, box_plot_id)
    
    # Convert plots to JSON and set view
    stacked_row_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(stacked_row_plot)
    scatter_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(scatter_plot)
    dot_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(dot_plot)
    box_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(box_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [stacked_row_plot_json, scatter_plot_json, dot_plot_json, box_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    cells_df.name = 'cells'

    macrophages = cells_df[cells_df['cell_type'] == 'macrophage']
    
    # Extract gene expression data for macrophages
    gene_expression_matrix = adata.X[macrophages.index, :].toarray()
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Identify highly expressed genes
    gene_sums = gene_expression_matrix.sum(axis=0)
    highly_expressed_genes_indices = np.argsort(gene_sums)[-50:]  # Top 50 highly expressed genes
    highly_expressed_genes = genes_df.index[highly_expressed_genes_indices]
    
    # Calculate co-expression relationships
    co_expression_matrix = np.corrcoef(gene_expression_matrix[:, highly_expressed_genes_indices], rowvar=False)
    
    # Create a network diagram
    G = nx.Graph()
    for i, gene1 in enumerate(highly_expressed_genes):
        for j, gene2 in enumerate(highly_expressed_genes):
            if i < j and co_expression_matrix[i, j] > 0.7:  # Threshold for co-expression
                G.add_edge(gene1, gene2, weight=co_expression_matrix[i, j])
    
    # Plot the network
    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 10))
    pos = nx.spring_layout(G)
    nx.draw(G, pos, with_labels=True, node_size=700, node_color='lightblue', font_size=10, font_weight='bold')
    plt.title("Co-expression Network of Highly Expressed Genes in Macrophages")
    plt.show()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
import networkx as nx
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
import json

def create_network_diagram(genes_df, expression_matrix, threshold=0.7):
    """Create a network diagram showing co-expression relationships."""
    # Calculate correlation matrix
    correlation_matrix = np.corrcoef(expression_matrix.T)
    
    # Create a graph
    G = nx.Graph()
    
    # Add nodes and edges based on correlation threshold
    for i, gene1 in enumerate(genes_df.index):
        for j, gene2 in enumerate(genes_df.index):
            if i < j and correlation_matrix[i, j] > threshold:
                G.add_edge(gene1, gene2, weight=correlation_matrix[i, j])
    
    # Draw the network
    pos = nx.spring_layout(G)
    nx.draw(G, pos, with_labels=True, node_size=700, node_color='lightblue', font_size=10, font_weight='bold')
    plt.title("Gene Co-expression Network")
    plt.show()

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "Gene Co-expression Network"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Extract expression data for macrophages
    macrophage_cells = cells_df[cells_df['final_analysis'] == 'macrophage']
    expression_matrix = adata[macrophage_cells.index].X.toarray()
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # Create a link between the two datasets
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene Expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", expression_matrix)
    
    # Create network diagram
    create_network_diagram(genes_df, expression_matrix)
    
    # Set view and serve project
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': []}}  # No initial charts, just the network diagram
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart
import json

def create_stacked_row_plot(title, params, size, position, legend_display, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties):
    plot = StackedRowChart(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_legend(legend_display)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", xaxis_properties)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", yaxis_properties)
    return plot

def create_scatter_plot(title, params, size, position, color, x_axis_settings, y_axis_settings):
    plot = ScatterPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_by(color)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", x_axis_settings)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", y_axis_settings)
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)

    # StackedRowChart parameters
    stacked_title = "Distribution of Cell States Across Conditions"
    stacked_params = ["Remission_status", "bucket"]
    stacked_size = [792, 472]
    stacked_position = [10, 10]
    stacked_legend_display = True
    stacked_xaxis_properties = {"label": "Remission Status", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    stacked_yaxis_properties = {"label": "Cell State", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    
    # Create stacked row plot
    stacked_row_plot = create_stacked_row_plot(
        stacked_title, stacked_params, stacked_size, stacked_position, stacked_legend_display, stacked_xaxis_properties, stacked_yaxis_properties
    )
    
    # ScatterPlot parameters
    scatter_title = "Cell-Cell Interaction Network"
    scatter_params = ["UMAP 1", "UMAP 2"]
    scatter_size = [792, 472]
    scatter_position = [820, 10]
    scatter_color = 'major'
    scatter_x_axis_settings = {'size': 30, 'label': "UMAP 1", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10}
    scatter_y_axis_settings = {'size': 45, 'label': "UMAP 2", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10, 'rotate_labels': False}
    
    # Create scatter plot
    scatter_plot = create_scatter_plot(
        scatter_title, scatter_params, scatter_size, scatter_position, scatter_color, scatter_x_axis_settings, scatter_y_axis_settings
    )
    
    # Convert plots to JSON and set view
    stacked_row_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(stacked_row_plot)
    scatter_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(scatter_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [stacked_row_plot_json, scatter_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
import json

def create_spatial_expression_plot(title, params, size, position, color, x_axis_settings, y_axis_settings):
    plot = ScatterPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_by(color)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", x_axis_settings)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", y_axis_settings)
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Ensure spatial data is available
    if "spatial" in adata.obsm:
        spatial_coords = adata.obsm["spatial"]
        cells_df["Spatial 1"] = spatial_coords[:, 0]
        cells_df["Spatial 2"] = spatial_coords[:, 1]
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)

    # Update datasource with the new columns provided through the scanpy object
    project.set_column('cells', "Spatial 1", cells_df["Spatial 1"])
    project.set_column('cells', "Spatial 2", cells_df["Spatial 2"])
    
    # ScatterPlot parameters for spatial expression
    gene_name = "IL6"
    scatter_title = f"Spatial Expression of {gene_name}"
    scatter_params = ["Spatial 1", "Spatial 2"]
    scatter_size = [792, 472]
    scatter_position = [10, 10]
    scatter_color = f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)}"
    scatter_x_axis_settings = {'size': 30, 'label': "Spatial 1", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10}
    scatter_y_axis_settings = {'size': 45, 'label': "Spatial 2", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10, 'rotate_labels': False}
    
    # Create scatter plot for spatial expression
    spatial_expression_plot = create_spatial_expression_plot(
        scatter_title, scatter_params, scatter_size, scatter_position, scatter_color, scatter_x_axis_settings, scatter_y_axis_settings
    )
    
    # Convert plots to JSON and set view
    spatial_expression_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(spatial_expression_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [spatial_expression_plot_json]}}
    
    # Creating the link between the two datasets so that selecting a subset of genes to add the expression in cells is enabled
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray()) # add the gene expression
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.table_plot import TablePlot
import json

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
import json

def create_dot_plot(title, params, size, position):
    plot = DotPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "Cell State", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "Expression Level", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "T Cell Marker Gene Expression"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Filter for T cells
    t_cells_df = cells_df[cells_df['major'] == 'T cells']
    
    # Find the top marker gene for T cells
    gene_expression_matrix = adata.X.toarray()
    t_cells_expression = gene_expression_matrix[t_cells_df.index, :]
    gene_sums = t_cells_expression.sum(axis=0)
    top_marker_gene_index = np.argmax(gene_sums)
    top_marker_gene_name = genes_df.index[top_marker_gene_index]
    print(f"Top marker gene for T cells: {top_marker_gene_name}")
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # Create a link between the two datasets
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene Expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", gene_expression_matrix)
    
    # DotPlot parameters for the top marker gene
    dot_title = f"Gene expression for {top_marker_gene_name} in T cells"
    dot_params = ["cell state", f"Gene expression|{top_marker_gene_name}(Gene expression)|{top_marker_gene_index}"]
    dot_size = [450, 300]
    dot_position = [10, 10]
    
    # Create dot plot
    dot_plot = create_dot_plot(dot_title, dot_params, dot_size, dot_position)
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    dot_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(dot_plot)
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [dot_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.box_plot import BoxPlot
import json

def create_box_plot(title, params, size, position, plot_id):
    """Create and configure a BoxPlot instance with the given parameters."""
    plot = BoxPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position,
        id=plot_id
    )
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    """Main function to create the project and serve it."""
    # Constants
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "IL6 Gene Expression Across Cell Types"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Check if IL6 is present in the dataset
    if "IL6" not in genes_df.index:
        print("The gene IL6 is not present in the dataset, so we cannot create a boxplot of its expression levels across cell types.")
        return
    
    # Get the index of IL6
    il6_index = genes_df.index.get_loc("IL6")
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # Create a link between the two datasets
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene Expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray())
    
    # BoxPlot parameters for IL6
    box_title = "Gene expression for IL6 across cell types"
    box_params = ['cell state', f'Gene expression|IL6(Gene expression)|{il6_index}']
    box_size = [615, 557]
    box_position = [50, 50]
    box_plot_id = "boxPlot1"
    
    # Create box plot
    box_plot = create_box_plot(
        box_title, box_params, box_size, box_position, box_plot_id
    )
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    box_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(box_plot)
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [box_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
import json 

def create_scatter_plot(title, params, size, position, color, x_axis_settings, y_axis_settings):
    plot = ScatterPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_by(color)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", x_axis_settings)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", y_axis_settings)
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)

    # Add UMAP data to the dataframe
    umap_np = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])
    cells_df["UMAP 1"] = umap_np[:, 0]
    cells_df["UMAP 2"] = umap_np[:, 1]

    # Update datasource with the new columns provided through the scanpy object
    project.set_column('cells', "UMAP 1", cells_df["UMAP 1"])
    project.set_column('cells', "UMAP 2", cells_df["UMAP 2"])

    # ScatterPlot parameters
    scatter_title = "UMAP Scatter Plot Colored by Disease Condition"
    scatter_params = ["UMAP 1", "UMAP 2"]
    scatter_size = [792, 472]
    scatter_position = [820, 10]
    scatter_color = 'Disease'  # Color by Disease condition
    scatter_x_axis_settings = {'size': 30, 'label': "UMAP 1", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10}
    scatter_y_axis_settings = {'size': 45, 'label': "UMAP 2", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10, 'rotate_labels': False}
    
    # Create scatter plot
    scatter_plot = create_scatter_plot(
        scatter_title, scatter_params, scatter_size, scatter_position, scatter_color, scatter_x_axis_settings, scatter_y_axis_settings
    )
    
    # Convert plots to JSON and set view
    scatter_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(scatter_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [scatter_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import json

    plot = DotPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "Cell State", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "Percentage of Cells Expressing TNF", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

    gene_expression_matrix = adata.X.toarray()

    percentage_expressing = cells_df.groupby('cell state')['TNF_expression'].mean() * 100

    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", gene_expression_matrix)
    
    # DotPlot parameters for TNF expression percentage

    dot_params = ["cell state", "TNF_expression"]

    dot_position = [10, 10]

    # Convert plot to JSON and set view

    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
import json

def create_dot_plot(title, params, size, position):
    plot = DotPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "Cell State", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "Percentage of Cells Expressing TNF", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "TNF Gene Expression Percentage"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing TNF
    gene_name = "TNF"
    gene_index = genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)
    gene_expression_matrix = adata.X.toarray()
    tnf_expression = gene_expression_matrix[:, gene_index]
    cells_df['TNF_expression'] = tnf_expression > 0
    percentage_expressing = cells_df.groupby('cell state')['TNF_expression'].mean() * 100
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)
    
    # Create a link between the two datasets
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene Expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", gene_expression_matrix)
    
    # DotPlot parameters for TNF expression percentage
    dot_title = "Percentage of Cells Expressing TNF per Cell State"
    dot_params = ["cell state", "TNF_expression"]
    dot_size = [450, 300]
    dot_position = [10, 10]
    
    # Create dot plot
    dot_plot = create_dot_plot(dot_title, dot_params, dot_size, dot_position)
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    dot_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(dot_plot)
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [dot_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import pandas as pd

import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
import json

def create_dot_plot(title, params, size, position):
    plot = DotPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "Cell State", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "Percentage of Cells Expressing TNF", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')

from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart
import json

def create_bar_chart(title, params, size, position, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties):
    plot = StackedRowChart(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", xaxis_properties)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", yaxis_properties)
    return plot

    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    
    # Bar chart parameters
    bar_title = "Number of Cells per Sample"
    bar_params = ["sample_id", "cellbarcode"]
    bar_size = [792, 472]
    bar_position = [10, 10]
    bar_xaxis_properties = {"label": "Sample ID", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    bar_yaxis_properties = {"label": "Number of Cells", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    
    # Create bar chart
    bar_chart = create_bar_chart(

    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)

    project.serve()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.bar_chart import BarChart  # Assuming BarChart is available in mdvtools
import json

def create_bar_chart(title, params, size, position, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties):
    plot = BarChart(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", xaxis_properties)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", yaxis_properties)
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    
    # BarChart parameters
    bar_title = "Number of Cells per Sample"
    bar_params = ["sample", "cell_count"]  # Assuming 'sample' is the column for sample names and 'cell_count' is calculated
    bar_size = [792, 472]
    bar_position = [10, 10]
    bar_xaxis_properties = {"label": "Sample", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    bar_yaxis_properties = {"label": "Number of Cells", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    
    # Calculate the number of cells per sample
    cells_df['cell_count'] = cells_df.groupby('sample').transform('size')
    
    # Create bar chart
    bar_chart = create_bar_chart(
        bar_title, bar_params, bar_size, bar_position, bar_xaxis_properties, bar_yaxis_properties
    )
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view

    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [bar_chart_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import json
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.bar_chart import BarChart  # Assuming BarChart is available in mdvtools

def create_bar_chart(title, params, size, position, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties):
    """Create and configure a BarChart instance with the given parameters."""
    plot = BarChart(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", xaxis_properties)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", yaxis_properties)
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    """Main function to create the project and serve it."""
    # Constants
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    
    # BarChart parameters
    title = "Number of Cells per Sample"
    params = ["sample_id", "cellbarcode"]  # Using 'sample_id' for sample and 'cellbarcode' for counting cells
    size = [792, 472]
    position = [10, 10]
    
    xaxis_properties = {"label": "Sample ID", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}
    yaxis_properties = {"label": "Number of Cells", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10}

    # Create bar chart
    bar_chart = create_bar_chart(title, params, size, position, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties)
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    bar_chart_json = convert_plot_to_json(bar_chart)
    barchart_view = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [bar_chart_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, barchart_view)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import json
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.stacked_row_plot import StackedRowChart

def create_bar_chart(title, params, size, position, legend_display, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties):
    """Create and configure a StackedRowChart instance as a bar chart with the given parameters."""
    plot = StackedRowChart(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )

    plot.set_color_legend(legend_display)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", xaxis_properties)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", yaxis_properties)

    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    """Convert plot data to JSON format."""
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\\\", ""))

def main():
    """Main function to create the project and serve it."""
    # Constants
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "default"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    
    # Bar chart parameters
    title = "Number of Cells per Sample"
    params = ["sample_id", "CellsLoaded"]  # Using 'sample_id' for samples and 'CellsLoaded' for the number of cells
    size = [792, 472]
    position = [10, 10]

    legend_display = False
    
    xaxis_properties = {"label": "Sample ID", 
                        "textSize": 13, 
                        "tickfont": 10
    }

    yaxis_properties = {"label": "Number of Cells", 
                        "textSize": 13, 
                        "tickfont": 10
    }

    # Create bar chart
    bar_chart = create_bar_chart(title, params, size, position, legend_display, xaxis_properties, yaxis_properties)
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    bar_chart_json = convert_plot_to_json(bar_chart)
    bar_chart_view = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [bar_chart_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, bar_chart_view)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
from mdvtools.charts.dot_plot import DotPlot
import json

def create_scatter_plot(title, params, size, position, color, x_axis_settings, y_axis_settings):
    plot = ScatterPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_by(color)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", x_axis_settings)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", y_axis_settings)
    return plot

def create_dot_plot(title, params, size, position):
    plot = DotPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "Cell State", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "Expression Level", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "IL10 Gene Expression in UMAP Clusters"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Add UMAP data to the dataframe
    umap_np = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])
    cells_df["UMAP 1"] = umap_np[:, 0]
    cells_df["UMAP 2"] = umap_np[:, 1]
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)

    # Update datasource with the new columns provided through the scanpy object
    project.set_column('cells', "UMAP 1", cells_df["UMAP 1"])
    project.set_column('cells', "UMAP 2", cells_df["UMAP 2"])
    
    # Create a link between the two datasets
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene Expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray())
    
    # ScatterPlot parameters
    scatter_title = "UMAP Scatter Plot"
    scatter_params = ["UMAP 1", "UMAP 2"]
    scatter_size = [792, 472]
    scatter_position = [820, 10]
    scatter_color = 'cell state'
    scatter_x_axis_settings = {'size': 30, 'label': "UMAP 1", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10}
    scatter_y_axis_settings = {'size': 45, 'label': "UMAP 2", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10, 'rotate_labels': False}
    
    # Create scatter plot
    scatter_plot = create_scatter_plot(
        scatter_title, scatter_params, scatter_size, scatter_position, scatter_color, scatter_x_axis_settings, scatter_y_axis_settings
    )
    
    # DotPlot parameters for IL10
    gene_name = "IL10"
    gene_index = genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)
    dot_title = f"Gene expression for {gene_name} per cell state"
    dot_params = ["cell state", f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{gene_index}"]
    dot_size = [450, 300]
    dot_position = [10, 500]
    
    # Create dot plot
    dot_plot = create_dot_plot(dot_title, dot_params, dot_size, dot_position)
    
    # Convert plots to JSON and set view
    scatter_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(scatter_plot)
    dot_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(dot_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [scatter_plot_json, dot_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    plot.set_axis_properties("x", {"label": "Cell Type", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", {"label": "Average Expression", "textSize": 13, "tickfont": 10})
    plot.set_color_scale(log_scale=False)
    plot.set_color_legend(True, [40, 10])
    plot.set_fraction_legend(True, [0, 0])
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "ABCC4 Gene Expression per Cell Type"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    genes_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.var)
    genes_df['gene_id'] = genes_df.index
    
    # Rename 'final_analysis' to 'cell state'
    cells_df.rename(columns={"final_analysis": "cell state"}, inplace=True)
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', cells_df)
    project.add_datasource('genes', genes_df)

    # Create a link between the two datasets
    project.add_rows_as_columns_link("cells", "genes", "gene_id", "Gene Expression")
    project.add_rows_as_columns_subgroup("cells", "genes", "Gene expression", adata.X.toarray())
    
    # DotPlot parameters for ABCC4
    gene_name = "ABCC4"
    gene_index = genes_df.index.get_loc(gene_name)
    dot_title = f"Average expression of {gene_name} per cell type"
    dot_params = ["cell state", f"Gene expression|{gene_name}(Gene expression)|{gene_index}"]
    dot_size = [450, 300]
    dot_position = [10, 10]
    
    # Create dot plot
    dot_plot = create_dot_plot(dot_title, dot_params, dot_size, dot_position)
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    dot_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(dot_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [dot_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
from mdvtools.mdvproject import MDVProject
from mdvtools.charts.scatter_plot import ScatterPlot
import json

def create_scatter_plot(title, params, size, position, color, x_axis_settings, y_axis_settings):
    plot = ScatterPlot(
        title=title,
        params=params,
        size=size,
        position=position
    )
    plot.set_color_by(color)
    plot.set_axis_properties("x", x_axis_settings)
    plot.set_axis_properties("y", y_axis_settings)
    return plot

def convert_plot_to_json(plot):
    return json.loads(json.dumps(plot.plot_data, indent=2).replace("\\", ""))

def main():
    project_path = os.path.expanduser('~/mdv/project')
    view_name = "Cluster Comparison on UMAP"
    
    # Load data
    data_path = "../../../../../../mariak/anndata_obj/sub_buckets/bcells_final.h5ad"
    adata = sc.read_h5ad(data_path)
    cells_df = pd.DataFrame(adata.obs)
    cells_df.name = 'cells'
    
    # Rename 'final_analysis' to 'cell state'
    cells_df.rename(columns={"final_analysis": "cell state"}, inplace=True)
    
    # Add UMAP data to the dataframe
    umap_np = np.array(adata.obsm["X_umap"])
    cells_df["UMAP 1"] = umap_np[:, 0]
    cells_df["UMAP 2"] = umap_np[:, 1]
    
    # Filter for clusters 1 and 2
    clusters_of_interest = ['1', '2']
    filtered_cells_df = cells_df[cells_df['cell state'].isin(clusters_of_interest)]
    
    # Create project
    project = MDVProject(project_path, delete_existing=True)
    
    # Add datasource
    project.add_datasource('cells', filtered_cells_df)

    # Update datasource with the new columns provided through the scanpy object
    project.set_column('cells', "UMAP 1", filtered_cells_df["UMAP 1"])
    project.set_column('cells', "UMAP 2", filtered_cells_df["UMAP 2"])
    
    # ScatterPlot parameters
    scatter_title = "UMAP Scatter Plot for Clusters 1 and 2"
    scatter_params = ["UMAP 1", "UMAP 2"]
    scatter_size = [792, 472]
    scatter_position = [820, 10]
    scatter_color = 'cell state'
    scatter_x_axis_settings = {'size': 30, 'label': "UMAP 1", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10}
    scatter_y_axis_settings = {'size': 45, 'label': "UMAP 2", 'textsize': 13, 'tickfont': 10, 'rotate_labels': False}
    
    # Create scatter plot
    scatter_plot = create_scatter_plot(
        scatter_title, scatter_params, scatter_size, scatter_position, scatter_color, scatter_x_axis_settings, scatter_y_axis_settings
    )
    
    # Convert plot to JSON and set view
    scatter_plot_json = convert_plot_to_json(scatter_plot)
    
    view_config = {'initialCharts': {'cells': [scatter_plot_json]}}
    
    project.set_view(view_name, view_config)
    project.set_editable(True)
    project.serve()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
